overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban waterfront area in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning on a sandy beach beneath an overpass, ascending through a concrete tunnel, and emerging into a covered promenade with distinctive orange arched canopies before reaching an open waterfront plaza with palm trees and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned beach area beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking across sandy terrain scattered with debris and abandoned furniture, approaching a modern building with glass facade

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating shadowed canopy overhead
contemporary building with reflective blue-tinted glass windows and concrete base
sand-covered ground with scattered debris and dry vegetation
rusted metal folding chairs and trash scattered on the sand
futuristic high-rise buildings with construction cranes visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens beneath a massive concrete overpass on a sandy urban beach. The camera moves forward past abandoned chairs and debris toward a modern glass building, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance. The area is deserted and sheltered from direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian underpass with ascending stairs

events.description: transitioning from dark tunnel interior to bright light visible at the stairwell exit
emerging from the concrete underpass into the covered walkway with orange arches

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs through the dimly lit tunnel toward the bright exit

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward through the tunnel
silver metal handrails lining both sides of the stairway
distinctive curved orange structural beams with glass panels visible at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark concrete tunnel and ascends a wide stairwell. As it climbs, bright daylight becomes visible at the exit, revealing the distinctive orange arched canopy structure ahead. The environment transitions from enclosed darkness to a brightly lit covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with orange arched canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered promenade, passing benches and planters under the orange arches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the covered pathway

entered.detail: transparent glass panels set between the orange arches allowing filtered sunlight
rectangular planters containing grass and small trees lining the walkway
teal and yellow modern benches positioned along the pathway
smooth concrete tiled walkway with green accent stripes

segments.scene_description: Walking through a futuristic covered promenade characterized by distinctive orange arched supports and a glass roof. The pathway features modern benches and planters with greenery. Sparse pedestrians walk in various directions, and tall buildings with digital billboards are visible through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with ocean view

events.description: exiting the covered canopy into the open waterfront plaza with direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the waterfront railing, passing people exercising and socializing

notable_agents.action: group of people gathered around outdoor exercise equipment and tables
pedestrians strolling along the waterfront promenade near the railing

entered.detail: metal railing marking the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
bright sunlit ocean visible beyond the waterfront railing
outdoor fitness equipment and folding tables set up on the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright, sunlit waterfront plaza with the ocean visible in the distance. Palm trees line the walkway, and groups of people exercise and socialize on the open concrete area. The orange canopy structure recedes to the left as the camera approaches the waterfront railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate urban beach through a concrete ascent and into a vibrant, sunlit waterfront plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass on a sandy shore, moving past debris toward a distant futuristic skyline. As the camera enters a dark concrete tunnel and climbs a wide stairwell, the enclosed shadows give way to bright daylight and the first glimpse of a distinctive orange arched canopy. The scene then expands into a futuristic covered promenade with glass roofing and digital billboards, where the camera glides past modern planters and sparse pedestrians. Finally, the canopy recedes to the left as the path opens into a bright plaza lined with palm trees and socializing crowds, ending at a railing overlooking the open ocean.
